overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a stormy night journey through a wetland area toward and onto a railway trestle bridge. The player character moves past a stationary train with illuminated windows, then proceeds along wooden railway tracks over dark water under dramatic moonlit storm clouds.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through grassy wetland toward distant lights visible through the storm

entered.detail: dark storm clouds with occasional moonlight breaking through
distant structure with warm lights visible through the darkness and trees
dark water reflecting the stormy sky
dark silhouettes of trees against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stormy night in a grassy wetland area. The camera moves forward through marshy terrain toward a distant structure with lights visible through the darkness. Dark clouds cover the sky with occasional moonlight breaking through, and scattered trees frame the view.

events.description: train with illuminated windows becomes clearly visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: moving alongside the railway trestle, passing the stationary train cars with glowing windows

notable_agents.action: stationary train with warm yellow lights visible through windows, positioned on elevated trestle

entered.detail: passenger train cars with illuminated windows on an elevated wooden trestle
wooden railway trestle bridge with support piers extending over water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves alongside a railway trestle where a stationary train with glowing windows sits on the tracks. The wooden trestle structure becomes prominent on the right, elevated over the dark water. The stormy sky continues to dominate with dramatic cloud formations.

events.description: moving from grassy bank onto the wooden railway trestle bridge

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the railway trestle and proceeding along the wooden tracks over water

entered.detail: metal railway tracks on wooden ties extending along the trestle
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway of the trestle bridge

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from land onto the wooden railway trestle, passing the train which now falls behind on the left. The perspective shifts to walking along the railway tracks over the dark water, with the wooden deck of the trestle now underfoot.

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the railway tracks on the elevated trestle, looking ahead toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: dark silhouetted mountains visible in the distance under storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving steadily along the railway trestle, with the tracks extending forward into the distance. The train has been left behind, and the view opens up to show dark mountains on the horizon beneath the dramatic stormy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a stormy grassy wetland onto an elevated railway trestle under a dramatic night sky. It begins by pushing through marshy terrain and scattered trees, guided by distant lights flickering through the darkness and breaking moonlight. As the camera approaches the structure, the scene shifts to move alongside a stationary train with glowing windows perched upon a wooden trestle elevated over dark water. The perspective then transitions from the land onto the wooden deck, passing the train as it recedes to the left while the camera settles onto the railway tracks. Finally, the view opens up as the camera moves steadily forward along the trestle toward distant dark mountains beneath the swirling storm clouds.
